name: self_modifier
description: Kernel component: self_modifier

name: gap_detector
description: Kernel component: gap_detector

name: capability_registry
description: Kernel component: capability_registry

name: model_interface
description: Kernel component: model_interface

name: generation_loop
description: Kernel component: generation_loop

name: alignment_gates
description: Kernel component: alignment_gates

name: user_communication
description: Implements robust user communication handling for sending messages, receiving input, and managing conversation state.

name: push_notification
description: Implements push notification sending via a service like Firebase Cloud Messaging for asynchronous user alerts.

name: discord_notifier
description: Implements sending asynchronous notifications to Jesse via Discord direct messages using DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and JESSE_DISCORD_ID.

name: event_loop
description: Implements a persistent asyncio event loop enabling Archi to run continuously, monitor for user messages from Jesse, detect gaps, and execute actions without exiting after each cycle.

name: api_introspection
description: Provides a mechanism to introspect available functions, signatures, and docstrings in registered capabilities and modules before generating dependent code.

name: discord_gateway
description: Establishes a persistent Discord gateway WebSocket connection using discord.py to receive MESSAGE_CREATE events for DMs from Jesse and routes them to Archi's user_communication for processing.

name: discord_listener
description: Establishes a persistent Discord WebSocket listener using discord_gateway to receive DMs from Jesse and processes them to trigger the generation loop or execute direct instructions.

name: self_evaluator
description: Provides a periodic self-reflection loop that analyzes interaction logs and operational history to proactively generate capability gaps and insights on improving service to Jesse.

name: image_analysis
description: Provides comprehensive image analysis for Discord attachments, including OCR text extraction, vision-based description, and detection/logging of capability gaps from screenshots of errors, conversations, or logs.

name: image_vision
description: Vision model integration to analyze and describe images from Discord messages using Claude-3.5-sonnet. Combines OCR and vision analysis to generate contextual responses for Jesse.

name: image_ocr
description: Dedicated capability for performing optical character recognition (OCR) on images from URLs to extract readable text.

name: conversational_memory
description: Implements persistent storage and retrieval of per-user conversation history to maintain context across sessions and messages.

name: image_recognition
description: Provides unified image recognition combining OCR text extraction and vision-based semantic interpretation for processing screenshots and conversation images from Discord.

name: timestamped_chat_history_recall
description: Retrieves specific past messages from a user's conversation history by matching exact timestamps.

name: wire_timestamped_chat_history_recall
description: Wire timestamped_chat_history_recall into the Discord listener's message processing to enable users to recall specific past messages or ranges by timestamp via simple commands.

name: gap_logging_sync
description: Synchronizes gap detection logging between backend terminal outputs and frontend Discord notifications to ensure accurate gap reporting to users like Jesse.

name: wire_gap_logging_sync
description: Integrate gap_logging_sync into the event loop to enable periodic synchronization of detected gaps with Discord, making it reachable and active.

name: message_recall_by_timestamp
description: Retrieves specific messages from a user's conversation history using human-readable timestamps like '9:48 PM' by parsing and matching against stored timestamps.

name: overnight_self_improvement
description: Provides autonomous overnight self-improvement by analyzing conversation history, capability usage, operational gaps, and Jesse's goals across Health, Wealth, Happiness, Agency, Capability, and Synthesis dimensions to implement targeted enhancements.

name: wire_message_recall_by_timestamp
description: Integrate the message_recall_by_timestamp capability into the Discord listener's message processing pipeline to handle user requests for recalling messages by human-readable timestamps.

name: wire_overnight_self_improvement
description: Modify the main run.py entry point to import and invoke the overnight_self_improvement capability, integrating it into the event loop for periodic overnight execution.

name: daily_health_tracker
description: Implements daily Discord DM prompts for Jesse's health metrics (sleep, steps, water, energy), parses responses from recent conversation history, stores data in JSON with trend analysis, and sends weekly summaries with rule-based insights integrated with conversational context.

name: wire_daily_health_tracker
description: Integrates the daily_health_tracker capability into the event_loop by adding a daily periodic task for health monitoring.

name: daily_wealth_tracker
description: Implements daily Discord DM prompts for wealth metrics like expenses, income, investments, and net worth; parses user responses via natural language understanding; stores data persistently alongside health metrics for trends; and generates weekly summaries, overspending alerts, and optimization suggestions.

name: wire_daily_wealth_tracker
description: Integrates the daily_wealth_tracker capability into the event loop as a daily periodic task, making it reachable and active for tracking Jesse's wealth.

name: daily_happiness_tracker
description: Implements daily Discord DM prompts for happiness metrics (mood 1-10, three gratitudes, social interactions, stressors), parses responses via regex and simple heuristics, stores structured data in data/happiness_log.jsonl, and sends weekly DM summaries with trends and suggestions.

name: wire_daily_happiness_tracker
description: Integrates the daily_happiness_tracker into the active event loop pathway by initializing it and scheduling its periodic tasks for daily happiness prompts, response checks, and weekly summaries to benefit Jesse.

name: weekly_dimension_synthesis
description: Weekly synthesis capability that aggregates data from daily Health, Wealth, and Happiness trackers, computes metrics like averages, trends, variances, and correlations, generates a formatted Discord DM report with ASCII charts, insights, recommendations, and anomaly flags.

name: wire_weekly_dimension_synthesis
description: Integration capability that initializes, registers, and wires the weekly_dimension_synthesis into the event loop for periodic execution.

name: daily_agency_tracker
description: Implements daily Discord DM prompts for Jesse's agency metrics including autonomy score (1-10), key decisions, and goal progress, with LLM-based parsing of responses from recent messages, persistent JSONL storage, trend-based motivational insights/alerts, and integration with weekly synthesis.

name: wire_daily_agency_tracker
description: Wires the daily_agency_tracker capability into the event loop by providing initialization and registration functions that integrate it for periodic prompting and response checking.

name: daily_capability_tracker
description: Implements daily Discord DM prompts for Jesse's capability metrics including hours studied, new skills, projects advanced, and self-assessed score, with NL parsing, persistent storage, and weekly trend previews.

name: wire_daily_capability_tracker
description: Wires daily_capability_tracker into the event loop.

name: weekly_full_dimension_synthesis
description: Aggregates weekly metrics from Health, Wealth, Happiness, Agency, and Capability daily trackers to compute trends, dimension scores, cross-dimensional insights, and generate comprehensive Discord DM reports with text charts, summaries, imbalances, and action recommendations.

name: wire_weekly_full_dimension_synthesis
description: Integrates weekly_full_dimension_synthesis into the active event loop pathway by providing initialization, registration, and event loop integration functions following established wiring patterns.

name: daily_action_recommender
description: Fetches latest data from daily trackers (Health, Wealth, Happiness, Agency, Capability) stored in data/ JSONL files, analyzes underperformance using model_interface LLM calls to generate 1-2 prioritized actions per dimension, and sends a concise daily DM summary via discord_notifier with expected impacts and follow-up integration.

name: wire_daily_action_recommender
description: Wires the daily_action_recommender capability into the event loop to enable periodic generation and delivery of daily action recommendations to Jesse via notifications.

name: dimension_trend_analyzer
description: Periodically analyzes historical data from daily trackers (Health, Wealth, Happiness, Agency, Capability) to compute trends like 7-day averages, growth rates, and correlations, generates text-based charts and insights, sends Discord DM summaries, and integrates with daily_action_recommender for prioritized actions.

name: wire_dimension_trend_analyzer
description: Wiring module that initializes and integrates the dimension_trend_analyzer into the event loop for periodic trend analysis execution.

name: personal_profile_manager
description: Maintains a structured JSON profile of Jesse's self-reported skills, job details, location, preferences, and goals by parsing conversation history and prompting for clarifications via Discord DMs when gaps are detected.

name: wire_personal_profile_manager
description: Integrates the personal_profile_manager into the event loop via a periodic task for profile updates and gap prompting, ensuring reachability and active usage.

name: detailed_skills_inventory_builder
description: Analyzes conversation history, personal profile, and user interactions to build and maintain a detailed, categorized inventory of Jesse's skills, with emphasis on tax, accounting, and unemployment insurance expertise.

name: wire_detailed_skills_inventory_builder
description: Integrates detailed_skills_inventory_builder into the event loop as a periodic task to maintain an up-to-date skills inventory in Jesse's personal profile.

name: google_sheets_analyzer
description: Implements secure Google Sheets API integration using service account authentication to read and analyze financial data from user-shared sheets, generating summaries, detecting anomalies, computing trends, and integrating with Discord commands and the event loop for periodic bill reviews.

name: google_sheets_bills_analyzer
description: Implements secure Google Sheets access for bills/expenses analysis, parsing data into daily_wealth_tracker-compatible structures, performing categorization/totals/trends/recommendations, and notifying via Discord DMs on command or periodically.

name: wire_google_sheets_bills_analyzer
description: Thin bridge module that initializes and wires google_sheets_bills_analyzer into the event loop for periodic bill analysis and into the Discord message queue for handling user-submitted bill sheets.

name: guess_couldn_read_file
description: Extracts text from PDF files via URL download and parsing, enabling processing of PDF attachments in Discord messages.

name: wire_google_sheets_analyzer
description: Integrates google_sheets_analyzer into the Discord message processing pipeline enabling Jesse to request analysis of specific Google Sheets via chat commands.

name: wire_guess_couldn_read_file
description: Integrates the guess_couldn_read_file capability into Discord message processing to handle PDF attachments and file readability queries from Jesse.

name: just_thought_possibly_spare
description: Provides a caching mechanism for LLM prompts and responses to reduce API costs by storing and reusing results for identical prompts.

name: wire_just_thought_possibly_spare
description: Provides a thin integration bridge that monkey-patches the kernel's model_interface.call_model to use the prompt cacher's cached_call_model for all future model invocations.

name: craigslist_pet_scanner
description: Scans Craigslist RSS feeds for madison.craigslist.org pets/dogs listings matching user keywords from personal_profile_manager, analyzes prices/contacts/dates/location relevance, and sends periodic Discord DM summaries with action links for rehoming/resale.

name: wire_craigslist_pet_scanner
description: Integrates the craigslist_pet_scanner into the event loop by providing initialization, registration, and wiring functions.

name: craigslist_dog_price_analyzer
description: Parses Madison Craigslist pets/dogs RSS feeds for Border Collie or specified breed keywords, extracts prices/ages/conditions via regex, computes median price/listing volume/trends stored in local SQLite DB, and sends periodic Discord DMs with summaries and pricing recommendations using Jesse's puppy profile.

name: register_craigslist_dog_price_analyzer
description: Update the existing Craigslist dog price analyzer to self-register as a periodic task using src.kernel.periodic_registry.register in its initialize function.
